title: Building Your Function Toolbox
description: Create a library of reusable farming functions - master the art of code organization.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's create practical farming functions! Start with plant_and_wait() that combines plant() and sleep().

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So one function call does both actions?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Create: def plant_and_wait(): with plant() and sleep(11000) inside.

objectives.description: Include both plant and sleep in the function

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Now I can call plant_and_wait() instead of writing two commands!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: That's the power of helper functions—packaging common operations!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's create harvest_plot(x, y) that moves to a position and harvests. Use movement and harvest commands inside!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So it takes x and y parameters and uses them to navigate?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! This function encapsulates a common farming task with custom positions.

objectives.description: Create harvest_plot function with x, y parameters

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: One function call to harvest any plot!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now create the ultimate farming function: farm_plot(x, y) that moves, plants, waits, and harvests!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: One function that does everything? That's incredibly efficient!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! This is abstraction—hiding complexity behind a simple interface.

objectives.description: Create farm_plot function with x, y parameters
Include complete farming cycle in function

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: This function is amazing! It does a complete farming operation!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now use all your functions together! Call farm_plot() multiple times with different positions and crops.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So instead of 20+ lines of code, I can do it in just a few function calls?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! That's the power of a function library. Your code becomes readable, maintainable, and elegant.

objectives.description: Use your function library to farm 5 plots efficiently

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: My code is so clean and organized now! Functions are incredible!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: You've mastered the basics of functions! But there's more—checking your energy before actions is crucial. Let's upgrade your functions with energy guards!
